creator: kiri@kiri.toba-cmt.ac.jp
text:
I've updated the port mmm-0.40 (www/mmm).

	Current modifications is

		(1) Change dir installation with install-info.

	Add,Delete and Update files are respecively

	[Add] :
		files/prefs.tmpl
		files/surfboard.html
		files/user-install.tmpl

	[Delete] :
		files/prefs
		files/user-install

	[Update] :
		Makefile
		files/md5
		patches/patch-ab
		pkg/COMMENT
		pkg/DESCR
		pkg/MESSAGE
		pkg/PLIST

	I put the diff from ports-current(www/mmm) in "Fix:".
